omniProcessElements.name: IP_CreatePNC
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_CreatePNC", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_CreatePNCRecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%AccountId%", "hpfList" : "%SelectedlstRecords%", "ContractId" : "%ContractId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "ClinicianContractAddHPF:CilinicianContract_GetFacilityForAddHPF", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContractId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "isCalledFromAddHPF" : true, "contractStartDate" : "%contractStartDate%", "contractEndDate" : "%contractEndDate%", "InvokeFrom" : "%InvokeFrom%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "selectedRecords" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }
